subject: chemistry
title: 16N.1.SL.TZ0.13
question_html:
Hydrazine reacts with oxygen.

N2H4(l) + O2(g) → N2(g) + 2H2O(l)      ΔHθ = -623 kJ

What is the standard enthalpy of formation of N2H4(l) in kJ? The standard enthalpy of formation of H2O(l) is -286 kJ.

A. -623 - 286
B. -623 + 572
C. -572 + 623
D. -286 + 623
